name: check_syntax
short_description: Check HDL syntax in the supplied fileset or active fileset.
full_help:
check_syntax

Description: 
Check HDL syntax in the supplied fileset or active fileset.

Syntax: 
check_syntax  [-fileset <arg>] [-return_string] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-fileset]        Fileset to check for syntax
  [-return_string]  Return the syntax check messages as a string
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Return the syntax check messages as a string
Suspend message limits during command execution
